title: Precompute with recording rules
description: Materialize expensive or repeated PromQL into recording rules so dashboards and alerts read cheap series.
body: Use when a costly aggregation is queried repeatedly by dashboards or alerts. Do not recompute a heavy expression on every dashboard refresh and alert evaluation — it loads the server and slows panels. Actions: define a recording rule that evaluates the expression on a schedule into a new series, and point dashboards and alert rules at that precomputed series. Validation signals include faster dashboard loads and the recording rule's series existing at the expected interval. Risk boundary: a recording rule with a too-coarse interval lags reality — match its evaluation interval to how fresh consumers need the data.
